package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for upstream_http_call_per_item_in_handler_loop: Upstream HTTP calls made per item inside handler loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule339NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule339NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule339NegativeRecord) (Rule339NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario339Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule339NegativeService, input Rule339NegativeRecord) (Rule339NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule339NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
